action.reasoning: Observation: Training with residual MLP achieved val mean R2 ~0.686 (ptend_q ~0.31 inferred), but test mean_r2 still -3.27M due to ptend_q r2 ~-7.5M (other r2s stable at 0.60/0.94/0.78). Large generalization gap isolated to humidity tendency. Analysis: Likely due to overfitting on complex q-dynamics; model produces large erroneous predictions on test distribution (different year). Current reg (dropout 0.15, WD 5e-4, small output init) insufficient. Adding input noise, stronger reg (dropout 0.2, WD 1e-3), higher q_weight=20, smaller LR, wider net (hidden=2048, blocks=4), more epochs, even smaller output std=1e-4 should improve robustness/capacity for q without hurting other components. Time per iter ~19min allows 50 epochs. Decision: Update model/train/predict with new arch/hypers/noise; train for 50 epochs with best ckpt on mean_val_r2; submit_eval on best.pt.
